title: auth register endpoint functionality
description: Verify that the /auth/register endpoint allows new users to register successfully with valid data and returns appropriate error messages for invalid inputs.

title: auth login endpoint functionality
description: Test the /auth/login endpoint to ensure users can log in with valid credentials and receive JWT tokens, and that invalid credentials are handled correctly.

title: auth refresh token endpoint functionality
description: Validate the /auth/refresh endpoint to confirm that it issues a new access token when provided with a valid refresh token and rejects invalid or expired tokens.

title: auth change password endpoint functionality
description: Check the /auth/change-password endpoint to ensure authenticated users can change their password successfully and that incorrect current passwords are rejected.

title: list provider services endpoint functionality
description: Verify that the /providers/me/services GET endpoint returns a list of services for the authenticated provider and handles cases where no services exist.

title: create provider service endpoint functionality
description: Test the /providers/me/services POST endpoint to ensure providers can create new services with valid data and receive appropriate errors for invalid inputs.

title: update provider service endpoint functionality
description: Validate the /providers/me/services/{id} PATCH endpoint to confirm that providers can update existing services and that updates with invalid data or non-existent service IDs are handled properly.

title: delete provider service endpoint functionality
description: Check the /providers/me/services/{id} DELETE endpoint to ensure providers can delete their services and that attempts to delete non-existent or unauthorized services are rejected.

title: list service categories endpoint functionality
description: Verify that the /providers/me/services/categories GET endpoint returns the list of available service categories correctly.

title: upload service image endpoint functionality
description: Test the /providers/me/services/image POST endpoint to ensure providers can upload images for their services and that invalid file types or sizes are rejected.
